title: (Associate) Director - Evidence Generation Oversight - International role based in Italy
Material Shipper
description:
**Date:** Jul 17, 2026


**Location:** Badia Polesine (RO), IT, 45021


**Company:** Dentsply Sirona, Inc


**Requistion ID**: 83753  


  

Dentsply Sirona is the world’s largest manufacturer of professional dental products and technologies, with over a century of innovation and service to the dental industry and patients worldwide. Dentsply Sirona develops, manufactures, and markets a comprehensive solutions offering including dental and oral health products as well as other consumable medical devices under a strong portfolio of world class brands.  



Dentsply Sirona’s products provide innovative, high\-quality, and effective solutions to advance patient care and deliver better and safer dental care. Dentsply Sirona’s headquarter is located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The company’s shares are listed in the United States on NASDAQ under the symbol XRAY. Visit www.dentsplysirona.com for more information about Dentsply Sirona and its products.  



For our manufacturing site in Badia Polesine (RO), we are looking for a:  


**Material Shipper**  



The successful candidate will be responsible for the day\-to\-day management of material and finished goods shipping activities, ensuring accuracy, traceability, and compliance with applicable regulations, while adhering to company quality, safety, and delivery standards.  


**Responsibilities**  


* Comply with company standards, company vision, and demonstrate respect toward colleagues and customers.
* Follow all health and safety regulations and procedures.
* Adhere to established procedures for performing assigned tasks.
* Prepare and manage shipments of materials and finished goods.
* Perform picking, packing, and labeling activities.
* Verify the accuracy and consistency of goods, orders, and related documentation.
* Prepare and review shipping documents, including Delivery Notes (DDT), Packing Lists, and CMRs.
* Load vehicles in accordance with safety procedures and requirements.
* Collaborate with warehouse, production, and logistics teams to ensure efficient shipment flow.
* Ensure full traceability of materials, including batch numbers, expiry dates, and product codes.
* Report any discrepancies or issues related to quantities, quality, or documentation.

  


**Requirements**  


* High school diploma, preferably in logistics, supply chain, or a technical field.
* Previous experience (1–3 years) in a warehouse, logistics, or shipping environment.
* Knowledge of warehouse management systems (WMS), Microsoft Office, and shipping management software.
* Knowledge of procedures and work instructions (WIs) related to the shipping process.
* Forklift license/certification is preferred.
* Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
* Reliable and committed to following procedures.
* Ability to work effectively within a team.
* Commitment to the company's core values of **Respect** (for company standards, vision, colleagues, and customers), **Responsibility**, **Collaboration**, **Reliability**, and **Agility** (continuous improvement).


What we offer:

You will join an international and stimulating work environment that fosters professional growth and development.

We offer a permanent employment contract under the Italian Chemical Industry Collective Labor Agreement (CCNL Industria Chimica), with a gross annual salary ranging from €25,000 to €30,000, commensurate with your experience and qualifications.

Our benefits package includes meal vouchers or local lunch discounts, a partnership with a CAF (Tax Assistance Center) for annual tax return preparation, as well as access to flexible working arrangements and smart working opportunities.  

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:** Dentsply Sirona is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will be considered without unlawful discrimination or regard for race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, sexual or gender identity, national or ethnic origin, age, marital status, disability, genetic factors, military and veteran status, or any other characteristics protected by applicable local law.
**Eligibility:** All successful applicants must be eligible to work in the country the position is based.
**Assistance:** If you need assistance with completing the online application due to a disability, please send an accommodation request to accommodationrequest@dentsplysirona.com.
**Agencies:** Please note that Dentsply Sirona does not accept or respond to unsolicited requests or applications submitted by Recruitment Agencies/ Search Firms.
**Notice on Fraudulent Job Offers:** Unfortunately, we are aware of third parties that pretend to represent our company offering unauthorized employment opportunities. If you think a fraudulent source is offering you a job, please have a look at the following information: careers.dentsplysirona.com.
